chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3492 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.14734/2025. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 24.09.2025 Mr. Munir Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Abdus Samad, Advocate for NADRA. Ms. Zehrah Sehar Veyani, Assistant Attorney General. Ms. Ghazala Noreen, Inspector FIA..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Parawise Comments have been submitted on behalf of Respondent Nos.1 and 2 which reiterate that the CNIC of the Petitioner was blocked pursuant to an Order of the trial Court in Case No.28/2012 arising out of FIR No.24/2012 registered at P.S FIA AHT Circle Karachi under Section-17(b) of Immigration Ordinance, 1979. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that such Order was made at an earlier time when the Petitioner had not surrendered before the Court, which he has since done and obtained interim pre- arrest bail, hence there is no further need for such measure to be maintained. He submits that an Application for unblocking of his CNIC (Annexure-D at page-45 of Court’s file), has also been made in the matter and the Petitioner would be satisfied if the same were to be decided within a reasonable timeframe. Under the circumstances, the Petition stands disposed of with the directions to the concerned Court seized of the aforementioned case to decide the Application for unblocking of petitioner’s CNIC within thirty days from today. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
